text.style: font-family:Cambria; font-weight:0; font-style:normal; font-size:7pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: «FeatureDataset»

text.style: font-family:Cambria; font-weight:700; font-style:normal; font-size:7pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: Features

text.style: font-family:Cambria; font-weight:700; font-style:normal; font-size:7pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

text.style: font-family:Cambria; font-weight:700; font-style:normal; font-size:7pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: Spatial References

text.style: font-family:Cambria; font-weight:0; font-style:normal; font-size:7pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: + MySpatialReference

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: The model is structured as follows:

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: - Feature classes are contained in the "Features" package.

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: - CodedValue- and RangeDomains are contained in the "Domains" package.

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: - Object classes are contained in the "Tables" package.

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: - All association classes created to represent n:m relationships between model classes

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: are contained in the "Association Classes" package.

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: Before exporting your model to an ArcGIS schema, you can change the Spatial Reference

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: element (currently set to EPSG:4326).

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: The Spatial Reference element is available under the "Spatial References" package. To

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: change the spatial reference system, simply select the "MySpatialReference" element and

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: choose: Extensions > ArcGIS > Set Coordinate System.

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: You can export your model as an ArcGIS schema by selecting the ArcGIS Workspace in the

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;

g.text: Project Browser and choosing:

text.style: font-family:Arial; font-weight:400; font-style:normal; font-size:9pt; fill:#000000;fill-opacity:1.00; stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:0.00 stroke-width:0; white-space: pre;
